message:
test(compat): add conformance suites 033-036 (JOIN, UPDATE, DELETE, compound queries)

Four new conformance suites exercising features that were previously
untested at the integration level:

- 033 (JOINs): INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, CROSS JOIN, self-join, JOIN+WHERE
- 034 (UPDATE): basic, multi-column, all-rows, expression in SET clause
- 035 (DELETE): WHERE, DELETE all, DELETE with IN subexpression
- 036 (compound queries): UNION ALL, UNION (distinct), INTERSECT, EXCEPT

These suites validate the end-to-end path from SQL text through parser,
planner, codegen, and VDBE execution for DML operations that the
existing suites (001-032) didn't cover.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
